subject: [PATCH v3 15/20] hpfs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations for the HPFS filesystem to use the new ->iomap_next() callback. This callback is generated using a macro that wraps an existing helper function, and it ensures that any unfinished mappings are completed before producing the next one. The change does not introduce any functional changes, only updating the interface used by the HPFS filesystem.
